text:
(a)
Queen Alia g
gave 100
gold coins to Princess
Elsa and 100
gold
coins to Princess
s Anna last year. Princess F
Elsa used the coins
to start a business a
and
doubled her coins. Princess
Anna
bought jewellery
and has only half of the coins left. Write
an expression describing how many g
gold coins Princess
s Elsa
 Princess Anna together have.
andj
